a11y.title: Accessibility
onboarding.welcome.title: Namaste 🙏
onboarding.welcome.body: Welcome, Hon'ble {name}. Saarthi turns fragmented citizen signals and public data into ranked, evidence-backed decisions for your constituency.
onboarding.welcome.sub: Two quick choices and you're in — you can change both anytime.
onboarding.language.title: Choose your language
onboarding.language.body: The interface, briefings, and the assistant all speak your language.
onboarding.language.more: {count} more scheduled languages are available from the language picker.
onboarding.a11y.title: Comfort & accessibility
onboarding.a11y.body: Turn on what helps you read and work. Nothing here is permanent.
onboarding.a11y.more: The full accessibility toolbar lives in the top bar, always one tap away.
assistant.title: Saarthi Assistant
assistant.welcome: Namaste. I answer from this constituency's live signals, budget, and actions — every claim cited.
